My son and I enjoyed ourselves at this event. It was our first time hanging out in Oakland and I would definitely come back and explore some more. We were there for the Hip-Hop night. It was so beautiful seeing the families come out with their blankets, kids were tossing footballs, flying kites, babies having play dates. The DJ was cool; the hip-hop dance lesson was fun. The food trucks were amazing; we had street tacos.  I love how each table outside had puzzles, and card games - we just had a ball. I would recommend everyone to come out for this family fun night.
